name: Magna Terra Minerals Inc.
summary: Magna Terra Minerals Inc. explores for precious metals. It holds interests in Santa Cruz projects that cover an area of approximately 89,000 hectares located in the province of Santa Cruz, Argentina. The company also holds 100% interest in Great Northern project comprising eight mineral exploration licenses that include 215 mineral claims covering an area of approximately 5,375 hectares; Viking project consisting of 4 mineral exploration licenses, which include 292 claims covering an area of approximately 7,300 hectares located in Newfoundland and Labrador; and Cape Spencer project comprising eight mineral licenses covering approximately 5,045 hectares situated in New Brunswick. Magna Terra Minerals Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
